text.div:
Generated Narrative: ImplementationGuide fhir.ph.core

Language: en

PHCoreImplementationGuide

The official URL for this implementation guide is: 

https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/ImplementationGuide/fhir.ph.core

This implementation guide is provided to support the use of FHIR®© in an Philippines context, and defines the minimum set of constraints on the FHIR resources to create the PH Core profiles. This implementation guide forms the foundation to build future PH Realm FHIR implementation guides and its content will continue to grow to meet the needs of PH implementers.

name: PHCoreImplementationGuide
title: Draft PH Core Implementation Guide
description: This implementation guide is provided to support the use of FHIR®© in an Philippines context, and defines the minimum set of constraints on the FHIR resources to create the PH Core profiles. This implementation guide forms the foundation to build future PH Realm FHIR implementation guides and its content will continue to grow to meet the needs of PH implementers.

extension.valueMarkdown: Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on HL7 Terminology
Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on the HL7 Extension Pack

resource.name: Administered Product
resource.description: The vaccine product that was administered.

resource.name: allergy-single-example
resource.description: Juan Dela Cruz has a high criticality, active allergy to Benethamine penicillin.

resource.name: Barangay
resource.description: Barangay from the standard geographic code.

resource.name: Barangays
resource.description: The Barangay codes valueset includes all barangay values from the Philippine Standard Geographic Codes (PSGC) published by the Philippine Statistic Authority (PSA).

resource.name: Batch Number
resource.description: The batch number of the vaccine administered.

resource.name: Cities
resource.description: All city values from the Philippine Standard Geographic Codes (PSGC) published by the Philippine Statistic Authority (PSA).

resource.name: City/Municipality
resource.description: City/municipality from the standard geographic code.

resource.name: claim-single-example
resource.description: A PhilHealth outpatient consultation claim for Juan Dela Cruz submitted by Dr. Maria Clara Santos for management of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus.

resource.name: condition-single-example
resource.description: Juan Dela Cruz has an active diagnosis of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus.

resource.name: DOH National Health Facility Registry Code

resource.name: DOH NHFR Code
resource.description: Health Facility Code (HFC) from the National Health Facility Registry

resource.name: DOH Procedure Identifier
resource.description: Identifier system for procedures assigned by the Department of Health (DOH) health facilities.

resource.name: Drugs
resource.description: This value set includes all drug or medicament substance codes and all pharmaceutical/biologic products from FDA.

resource.name: Educational Attainment
resource.description: Highest educational attainment of the patient.

resource.name: Educational Attainments
resource.description: All categories of educational programs, courses, and attainment levels in the Philippines, based on the Philippine Standard Classification of Education (PSCED) published by the Philippine Statistics Authority (PSA)

resource.name: encounter-single-example
resource.description: An ambulatory visit for Juan Dela Cruz that has been completed.

resource.name: Example PH Core HealthcareService
resource.description: Philippine General Hospital Outpatient Department providing General Medicine consultations as a PH Core HealthcareService.

resource.name: Example PH Core Location
resource.description: Philippine General Hospital - A government tertiary hospital located in Manila, Philippines.

resource.name: Example PH Core Organization
resource.description: An example instance of a PH Core Organization conforming to the Philippine localization profile. Demonstrates all identifier types (NHFR, HCPN, PAN, PEN) and Must Support fields.

resource.name: example-allergy
resource.description: Juan Dela Cruz has a high criticality, active allergy to Benethamine penicillin.

resource.name: example-condition
resource.description: Juan Dela Cruz has an active diagnosis of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus.

resource.name: example-encounter
resource.description: An ambulatory encounter for Juan Dela Cruz that has been completed.

resource.name: example-immunization
resource.description: Flu shot for H5N1-1203.

resource.name: example-medication
resource.description: A medication resource with no specific details provided.

resource.name: example-patient
resource.description: Juan Dela Cruz is a male patient born on 1 January 1980, residing in Manila, NCR, Philippines.

resource.name: example-practitioner
resource.description: Dr. Maria Clara Santos, a female practitioner born on 1985-05-15, resides at 1234 Mabini Street, Manila, NCR, 1000, Philippines. She can be contacted via mobile at +63-912-345-6789 or by email at maria.santos@example.ph.

resource.name: HCPN Code
resource.description: Health Care Provider Network (HCPN) code uniquely identifying an organization within its Health Care Provider Network in the Philippines.

resource.name: Health Care Provider Network Code
resource.description: Health Care Provider Network (HCPN) code uniquely identifying an organization within its Health Care Provider Network in the Philippines.

resource.name: immunization-single-example
resource.description: Juan Dela Cruz received a completed intramuscular influenza (H5N1-1203) vaccine at Philippine General Hospital on January 10, 2013.

resource.name: Indigenous Group
resource.description: Indigenous / ethnic group that the patient belongs to.

resource.name: Indigenous Groups CodeSystem
resource.description: A list of codes representing the recognized indigenous groups in the Philippines to which a person may belong.

resource.name: Indigenous Groups ValueSet
resource.description: A value set representing the recognized Indigenous groups to which a person may belong.

resource.name: Indigenous People
resource.description: If the patient is a member of an indigenous group.

resource.name: medication-single-example

resource.description: Juan Dela Cruz takes Twinact (Telmisartan + Amlodipine) tablet as prescribed.

resource.name: medicationrequest-single-example

resource.name: medicationstatement-single-example
resource.description: Patient Juan Dela Cruz reports taking Twinact (Telmisartan + Amlodipine) for hypertension.

resource.description: Hemoglobin A1c lab result based on a service request for diabetes monitoring.

resource.description: BMI calculated from height and weight observations for Juan Dela Cruz.

resource.name: observation-environmental-temp-example
resource.description: Environmental temperature observation for a hospital ward (Location as subject).

resource.name: observation-glucose-example
resource.description: Fasting blood glucose observation for Juan Dela Cruz.

resource.name: observation-height-example
resource.description: Body height observation for Juan Dela Cruz.

resource.name: observation-lab-panel-example
resource.description: Basic Metabolic Panel with references to individual electrolyte observations.

resource.name: observation-part-of-procedure-example
resource.description: Intraoperative blood pressure observation during appendectomy procedure.

resource.name: observation-performer-role-example
resource.description: Heart rate observation performed by a practitioner in a specific role.

resource.name: observation-potassium-example
resource.description: Serum potassium observation for Juan Dela Cruz.

resource.name: observation-sodium-example
resource.description: Serum sodium observation for Juan Dela Cruz.

resource.name: observation-vitals-encounter-example
resource.description: Body temperature observation for Juan Dela Cruz taken during an ambulatory encounter.

resource.name: observation-weight-example
resource.description: Body weight observation for Juan Dela Cruz.

resource.name: Occupation
resource.description: Patient's occupation.

resource.name: Occupation Classifications
resource.description: The Occupation codes valueset includes Occupational Classification values from the Philippine Standard Occupational Classification (PSOC) published by the Philippine Statistic Authority (PSA).

resource.name: PAN - PhilHealth Accreditation Number
resource.description: The unique number issued by PhilHealth to accredited institutions.

resource.name: patient-single-example
resource.description: Juan Dela Cruz is a male patient born on 1 January 1980, residing in Manila, NCR, Philippines.

resource.name: PEN - PhilHealth Employer Number
resource.description: The unique number issued by PhilHealth to employers.

resource.name: PH Core Address
resource.description: An address for the individual.

resource.name: PH Core AllergyIntolerance
resource.description: This profile sets minimum expectations for an AllergyIntolerance resource to record, search, and fetch basic allergy intolerance information for a patient. It is based on the [FHIR R4 AllergyIntolerance](https://www.hl7.org/fhir/R4/allergyintolerance.html) resource and identifies the *additional* mandatory core elements, extensions, vocabularies and value sets that **SHALL** be present in the AllergyIntolerance when conforming to this profile. It provides the floor for standards development for specific uses cases in a Philippine context.

resource.name: PH Core Claim
resource.description: Captures information about a request for reimbursement or payment for health care products and services within the Philippine health system, including specific benefit packages such as Animal Bites and TB DOTS programs.

resource.name: PH Core Condition
resource.description: Captures Condition.

resource.name: PH Core Consumer
resource.description: A PH Core Consumer is a system that receives and uses PH Core resources.

resource.name: PH Core Creator
resource.description: A PH Core Creator is a system which produces/assembles/creates PH Core resources.

resource.name: PH Core Disability Type Code System
resource.description: Code system for types of disability as defined by the Philippine government for PWD registration.

resource.name: PH Core Disability Type Value Set
resource.description: Value set for types of disability as defined by the Philippine government for PWD registration.

resource.name: PH Core Encounter
resource.description: This profile sets minimum expectations for an Encounter resource to record, search, and fetch basic encounter information for a patient. It is based on the [FHIR R4 Encounter](https://www.hl7.org/fhir/R4/encounter.html) resource and identifies the *additional* mandatory core elements, extensions, vocabularies and value sets that **SHALL** be present in the Encounter when conforming to this profile. It provides the floor for standards development for specific uses cases in a Philippine context.

resource.name: PH Core HealthcareService
resource.description: This profile sets minimum expectations for a HealthcareService resource to record, search, and fetch information about healthcare services offered by an organization or at a location in the Philippine context. It is based on the [FHIR R4 HealthcareService](https://www.hl7.org/fhir/R4/healthcareservice.html) resource and identifies the *additional* mandatory core elements, extensions, vocabularies and value sets that **SHALL** be present in the HealthcareService when conforming to this profile. It provides the floor for standards development for specific use cases in a Philippine context.

resource.name: PH Core Immunization
resource.description: Describes the event of a patient being administered a vaccine or a record of an immunization as reported by a patient, a clinician or another party.

resource.name: PH Core Location
resource.description: This profile localizes the FHIR R4 Location resource to the Philippine context.

resource.name: PH Core Medication
resource.description: This resource is primarily used for the identification and definition of a medication, including ingredients, for the purposes of prescribing, dispensing, and administering a medication as well as for making statements about medication use.

resource.name: PH Core Medication Administration
resource.description: Captures key FHIR Medication Administration data for the Philippine context.

resource.name: PH Core Medication Dispense
resource.description: Captures key FHIR Medication Dispense data for the Philippine context.

resource.name: PH Core Medication Request
resource.description: Captures key FHIR Medication Request data for the Philippine context.

resource.name: PH Core Medication Statement
resource.description: Captures key FHIR Medication Statement data for the Philippine context.

resource.name: PH Core Name
resource.description: A name of a person in the philippine context.

resource.name: PH Core Observation
resource.description: Measurements and simple assertions made about a patient, device or other subject.

resource.name: PH Core Organization
resource.description: This profile localizes the FHIR R4 Organization resource to the Philippine context.

resource.name: PH Core Patient
resource.description: Captures key demographic and administrative information about individuals receiving care or other health-related services.

resource.name: PH Core Practitioner
resource.description: The PH Core Practitioner Profile inherits from the [FHIR R4 Practitioner resource](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/practitioner.html); refer to it for scope and usage definitions. This profile sets minimum expectations for the Practitioner resource to record, search, and fetch basic demographics and administrative information about an individual practitioner in a Philippine context. It specifies which core elements, extensions, vocabularies, and value sets SHALL be present and constrains how the elements are used. It provides the floor for standards development for Philippine use cases.

resource.name: PH Core PractitionerRole
resource.description: The PH Core Practitioner Role Profile inherits from the [FHIR R4 PractitionerRole resource](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/practitionerrole.html); refer to it for scope and usage definitions. This profile sets minimum expectations for the PractitionerRole resource to record, search, and fetch basic demographics and administrative information about an individual practitioner role in a Philippine context. It specifies which core elements, extensions, vocabularies, and value sets SHALL be present and constrains how the elements are used. It provides the floor for standards development for Philippine use cases.

resource.name: PH Core Procedure
resource.description: An action that is or was performed on or for a patient, practitioner, device, organization, or location.

resource.name: PH Core Provenance
resource.description: This profile localizes the FHIR R4 Provenance resource to the Philippine context, capturing key information about who, what, when, and where for a set of resources. It is used to track the authorship and history of healthcare data in Philippine health information systems.

resource.name: PH Core PWD Disability Registration
resource.description: Extension for Person With Disability (PWD) registration information. Captures PWD ID number, type of disability, and ID expiration date as issued by the PDAO (Persons with Disability Affairs Office).

resource.name: PH Core RelatedPerson
resource.description: This profile localizes the FHIR R4 RelatedPerson resource to the Philippine context.

resource.name: PH Core Server
resource.description: A PH Core Server is a FHIR server that stores and provides access to PH Core resources.

resource.name: PH Core ServiceRequest
resource.description: The PH Core ServiceRequest Profile is a Philippine-specific FHIR profile that represents a record of a request for services such as diagnostic investigations, treatments, or operations to be performed within the Philippine health system. It constrains the base FHIR ServiceRequest resource by defining minimum expectations on core elements, extensions, vocabularies, and value sets relevant to local clinical and administrative workflows. It serves as a nationally consistent baseline for recording, searching, and fetching service request information to support interoperable health information exchange across Philippine health facilities and programs.

resource.name: PH Core Task
resource.description: This profile localizes the FHIR R4 Task resource to the Philippine context.

resource.name: PH FDA Certificate of Product Registration (CPR) CodeSystem
resource.description: Registered drug products from the Philippine Food and Drug Administration (FDA)

resource.name: PhilHealth Accreditation Number
resource.description: The unique number issued by PhilHealth to accredited institutions.

resource.name: PhilHealth Employer Number
resource.description: The unique number issued by PhilHealth to employers.

resource.name: PhilHealth Procedure Identifier
resource.description: Identifier system for procedures assigned by PhilHealth for claims and reimbursement purposes.

resource.name: philhealth-coverage-example
resource.description: PhilHealth coverage for Juan Dela Cruz with member ID 63-584789845-5.

resource.name: PhilSys Identification Number (PhilSys ID) Identifier
resource.description: The National ID Number PSA issued to all Filipino citizens and resident aliens in the Philippines, as part of the Philippine Identification System (PhilSys) program.

resource.name: PhilSys Identification Number (PhilSys ID) NamingSystem
resource.description: The National ID Number issued to all Filipino citizens and resident aliens in the Philippines, as part of the Philippine Identification System (PhilSys) program.

resource.name: PIN - PhilHealth Identification Number Identifier
resource.description: The permanent and unique number issued by PhilHealth to individual members and to each and every dependent.

resource.name: PIN - PhilHealth Identification Number NamingSystem
resource.description: The permanent and unique number issued by PhilHealth to individual members and to each and every dependent.

resource.name: practitioner-single-example
resource.description: Dr. Maria Clara Santos, MD, a licensed physician born on 1985-05-15, residing in Manila, Philippines. She can be contacted via mobile at +63-912-345-6789 or by email at maria.santos@example.ph. She speaks Filipino and English.

resource.name: practitionerrole-single-example
resource.description: Dr. Maria Clara Santos is a General Practitioner working with the Department of Health. One of her assignments is at the Philippine General Hospital.

resource.name: procedure-single-example
resource.description: A comprehensive example of an appendectomy procedure performed on Juan Dela Cruz, demonstrating extensive use of Procedure resource elements including identifiers, status history, multiple performers, body site, complications, and follow-up care.

resource.name: provenance-single-example
resource.description: Provenance record documenting that Dr. Maria Clara Santos created the blood pressure observation for Juan Dela Cruz on September 17, 2012, on behalf of the Department of Health - Central Office.

resource.name: Province
resource.description: Province from the standard geographic code.

resource.name: Provinces
resource.description: All province values from the Philippine Standard Geographic Codes (PSGC) published by the Philippine Statistic Authority (PSA).

resource.name: Race
resource.description: race of a patient.

resource.name: Region
resource.description: Region from the standard geographic code.

resource.name: Regions
resource.description: The Region codes valueset includes all region values from the Philippine Standard Geographic Codes (PSGC) published by the Philippine Statistic Authority (PSA).

resource.name: relatedperson-single-example
resource.description: Maria Cruz Santos is a female born on 1 January 1955, mother of the patient.

resource.name: servicerequest-single-example
resource.description: A laboratory service request for fasting blood glucose test ordered by Dr. Maria Clara Santos for patient Juan Dela Cruz during an ambulatory encounter.

resource.name: task-single-example
resource.description: A laboratory task for Juan Dela Cruz requested by Dr. Maria Clara Santos. The task is to collect a blood sample for a routine CBC test.

resource.name: transaction-example
resource.description: Transaction bundle demonstrating a coherent clinical scenario: Juan Dela Cruz has a blood pressure check during an encounter with Dr. Maria Clara Santos, with his known allergies, conditions, and immunization history.
